creator: alexkono2000@yahoo.com
text:
I report following motherboard functioning on FreeBSD:

Manufacturer:
 Gigabyte

Model:
 GA-MA770-DS3

Chipset/Socket:
 AMD 770, socket AM2+

Submitter:
 Alexander Konovalenko

FreeBSD ver: 6.3-PRERELEASE (amd64)

Notes:
 Tested with AMD Phenom (SMP mode) and 4Gb memory dual channel. SATA works, raid  not tested, sound not tested. On-board ethernet works. ACPI enabled though not fully tested.
